Localization.Description: Approval rule management for a project

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.fullname} removed the group "{object.value}" from the approval rule "{object.name}" for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.fullname} removed the user {object.value} from the approval rule "{object.name}" for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.fullname} created the approval rule "{object.name}" for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.fullname} removed the approval rule "{object.name}" for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.fullname} changed the approval rule "{object.name}" for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.fullname} added the user {object.new_value} to the approval rule "{object.name}" for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.fullname} added the group "{object.new_value}" to the approval rule "{object.name}" for the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} on host {event_src.host}
